feedback.text: I support the idea of this Act, however it might be worth to consider the addition of a clause specifically prohibiting mobile device OS manufacturers (e.g. Google or Apple) from applying restrictions to permit only the installation of applications that have been permitted (and digitally signed) by them, as it provides those manufacturers with a monopolistic advantage. This is in relation to Google announcing a restriction on its Android operating system that prevents unapproved applications from running on any device running that OS.
